blockerNote: Deployer wallet spent down to dust. Send 0.02 ETH to 0xB328b90166bcFE5523730dd82a7E50A1eA506EBf on Base to unblock.
deployCommand: export PATH="$PATH:/home/openclaw/.foundry/bin" && cd /data/workspace/service-registry && OWNER_ARG=$(cast abi-encode 'constructor(address)' 0xed2ceca9de162c4f2337d7c1ab44ee9c427709da | sed 's/0x//') && BYTECODE=$(forge inspect ServiceRegistryV2 bytecode) && DEPLOY_DATA="${BYTECODE}${OWNER_ARG}" && cast send --rpc-url https://mainnet.base.org --private-key <DEPLOY_KEY> --gas-limit 2848692 --create "${DEPLOY_DATA}"
